title: Bare Bones X Enchantment Outlines
description: Bare Bones X Enchantment Outlines adds crisp, colorful outlines to enchanted items while keeping the minimalist Bare Bones X style. Perfect for PvP or survival, it improves visibility of gear without impacting performance.
body:
**Bare Bones X Enchantment Outlines

See your enchantments like never before — minimal, clear, and stylish.

Bare Bones X Enchantment Outlines is a sleek, lightweight resource pack designed to enhance the way enchanted items look in Minecraft. Keeping the minimalist Bare Bones aesthetic, it adds crisp, vibrant outlines to enchanted gear, making it easier to identify important items instantly — perfect for PvP, survival, and everyday gameplay.

Features

Sharp Enchantment Outlines: Instantly spot enchanted items with clean, colorful borders.

Minimalist Bare Bones X Design: Maintains the classic action-focused style.

PvP Optimized: Quick recognition of gear in fast-paced combat.

Performance-Friendly: Low impact on FPS, ideal for both high-end and low-end PCs.

Fully Compatible: Works with Bare Bones X and other minimal resource packs.**
